description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a rounded shoulder leading up to a small, white cap. The bottle is made of a glossy green plastic, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. Subtle embossed or printed text is visible on the front and back, with the front featuring a prominent '@' symbol and the word 'actually' as part of the branding. The back side contains more detailed product information in smaller text. The cap appears to be a disc top style, designed for easy dispensing. The overall design is minimalistic, with no additional graphic elements or patterns beyond the text.
description: A tall, glossy green cylindrical shampoo bottle with a white disc top cap and subtle embossed branding and text.
description_view_0: Front view shows the '@' symbol and 'actually' branding clearly embossed or printed on the bottle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the smooth, uninterrupted green surface with minimal visible text or features.
description_view_2: Back view displays detailed product information and instructions in smaller text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a plain green surface with no visible text or graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A large '@' symbol is visible on the front.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with rounded shoulders and a narrow neck
